subcodes.first_line: Concerning the translation of the Kitáb-i-Aqdas which one of the beloved of God hath made, whereof thou didst write, although the intentions of the translator were good [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: در خصوص ترجمهٴ کتاب اقدس که یکی از احبّآء اللّه نموده مرقوم فرموده بودید اگرچه مقاصد جناب مترجم خیر بوده
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @authentication; disposition of the Sacred Writings, @collection; ordering of the Sacred Writings, @praise and encouragement
